title: helianthemum umbellatum
intro: Helianthemum umbellatum, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helianthemum umbellatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and exhibit antiseptic properties, which can help in wound healing and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of Rock Rose include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
